session.user: Run the fast CI checks and report results. Execute: `make fast-ci` in /home/runner/work/erk/erk and report what passes/fails.

make: *** [Makefile:97: fast-ci] Error 1
session.assistant:
The make command exited with code 2 (early termination), but looking at the output, here's the breakdown:
**Fast CI Results:**
**PASSED:** - Lint check: `All checks passed!` - Format check: `1739 files already formatted` - Markdown check: OK - Exec Reference check: `OK: .claude/commands/erk-exec/reference.md is up to date` - Type check (ty): `All checks passed!` - Unit tests (erk): **5920 passed** in 25.25s - Unit tests (erk-dev): **138 passed** in 5.29s - Unit tests (erk-statusline): **123 passed** in 0.84s - Unit tests (erk-mcp): **50 passed** in under 1s
**FAILED:** - Prettier formatting check: **4 files have code style issues** (requires --write to fix) - .claude/commands/erk/objective-plan.md - .claude/commands/erk/system/objective-plan-node.md - docs/learned/integrations/github-review-decision.md - docs/learned/tui/status-indicators.md
**Summary:** 6,231 tests passed across all packages, but the build failed due to 4 files that need Prettier formatting. These are documentation/markdown files that need style corrections.
